data.body:
on first doctor run:

       ⚠  Repo "foolery" has AGENTS.md with mismatched prompt profile. Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "foolery" has CLAUDE.md with mismatched prompt profile. Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "knots" has AGENTS.md but it is missing Foolery guidance prompt. Run `foolery prompt` in /Users/cartine/knots.
       ⚠  Repo "knots" has CLAUDE.md but it is missing Foolery guidance prompt. Run `foolery prompt` in /Users/cartine/knots.
       ⚠  Repo "1brutus" has AGENTS.md but it is missing Foolery guidance prompt. Run `foolery prompt` in /Users/cartine/1brutus.
       ⚠  Repo "1brutus" has CLAUDE.md but it is missing Foolery guidance prompt. Run `foolery prompt` in /Users/cartine/1brutus.

ran `kno doctor --fix`

second doctor run:
  ⚠  Prompt guidance         6 warnings
       ⚠  Repo "foolery" has AGENTS.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "foolery" has CLAUDE.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "knots" has AGENTS.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "knots" has CLAUDE.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "1brutus" has AGENTS.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.
       ⚠  Repo "1brutus" has CLAUDE.md with mismatched prompt profile (beads-coarse-human-gated). Expected one of: autopilot, autopilot_no_planning, autopilot_with_pr, autopilot_with_pr_no_planning, semiauto, semiauto_no_planning.

identify root cause - is doctor --fix doing something wrong?  or is doctor's heuristic wrong?

design neat/clean fix
data.title: foolery doctor: Not handling readme's/prompts gracefully
